source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.official_english: China's GDP grows 4.7% in first half of 2026
topics.why_hot: Key economic indicator released, reflecting national economic performance.
topics.share_angle: Explain what the GDP growth means for ordinary people and global economy.

topics.chinese_topic: 暴雨、高温、强对流三预警齐发

topics.why_hot: Severe weather warnings affect large population; public safety concern.
topics.share_angle: How to stay safe during extreme weather; climate change context.
